---
title: "F. de Normanville"
---

## F. de Normanville

**Dates:** (b. 1770/1)

### Description

French and Italian teacher

### Biography

A French emigré who taught CMY French and Italian, he appears in the 1841 Otterbourne  census with his wife Mary de Normanville (b. 1787/8).  He is probably the Francis de Normanville who married Mary Callendar in Chelsea in 1816.

### Letters

- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Wednesday 5 [December 1838]
- Letter from [late December 1838  or early January  1839]
- Letter from [March 1836]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
